## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and negotiate the terms of a potential partnership between Hims and GrowthX for content creation and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) recently secured Series A funding, causing some delay in communications](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Hims' budget expectations (\~$9-11k/month) were significantly lower than GrowthX's initial proposal](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to reduce scope and price, potentially landing at \~$18k/month (down from $45k) for a more limited engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Both parties are exploring a 90-day pilot period to test the partnership and calibrate processes](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

## Topics

### Recent Company Updates

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) signed a Series A term sheet with desired investor and terms](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Funding allows for increased investment in engineering talent and provides credibility](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Busy week dealing with legal aspects of the funding round](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)

### Budget and Pricing Concerns

  - [Hims initially budgeted for $9-11k per month, significantly lower than GrowthX's proposal](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [GrowthX's standard rate: $12k/month for 1200 pages/year of programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Higher costs driven by custom integrations, medical research databases, and multi-layer review processes](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Marcel offered to reduce scope and price to \~$18k/month (from $45k) by removing certain work streams](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Quality and Review Process

  - [GrowthX emphasizes multiple layers of checks and reviews for medical content](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Process includes vetting sources, flagging claims, and potentially involving medical experts](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Hims wants to ensure adequate vetting without duplicating work or creating an onerous internal review process](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### GrowthX's Technical Capabilities

  - [Marcel demonstrated GrowthX's workflow engine, showing detailed, AI-driven research and content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Workflows are customizable and can be adapted to Hims' specific quality and accuracy requirements](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [The system allows for continuous improvement based on feedback and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [Discussed possibility of a 90-day pilot period to test the partnership and calibrate processes](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [GrowthX willing to take on upfront costs and risks to prove value](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Both parties open to exploring options for content output and contract length](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to revise the proposal, reducing scope and price to around $18k/month](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [Marcel to add language about a 90-day pilot period in the revised proposal](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more explicit details about GrowthX's processes and cost drivers in the Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Hims to review the revised proposal and provide feedback on language and clarity](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Hims to internally discuss the new proposal, including potential adjustments to content output and contract length](https://fathom.video/share/YmaF3P6dDsKymdSPNyPAHXh2vehyZsEZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
